title: read_test_stmt duplicates read_stmt token handling
description: read_test_stmt in form.rs is a near-verbatim copy of read_stmt: both convert the same six token variants (Word, Tag, StringLit, Number, LBracket, LParen, LBrace) into the corresponding Form. The only difference is that read_test_stmt stops at Comma/RParen instead of Semicolon. Suggested rewrite: extract fn read_form(tokens, pos) -> Result<Option<(Form, usize)>, ParseError> that converts one token to one Form (or returns None for stop tokens the caller defines). Both read_stmt and read_test_stmt loop over it, passing their respective stop-token predicate.
